AboutStats.sectionSubtitle: Engineering digital experiences with modern technologies and creative solutions
AboutStats.headline: Engineering digital experiences that feel alive.
AboutStats.description: I am a Software Engineer focused on building immersive digital experiences. Currently exploring modern web technologies and best practices to bridge the gap between design and development.
AboutStats.modernStackDesc: Next.js, Tailwind, TypeScript, and React for high-end web apps.
AboutStats.performanceDesc: Optimizing for Core Web Vitals and seamless 60fps interactions.
AboutStats.systemDesignDesc: Architecting scalable components and design systems.
AboutStats.motionDesignDesc: Crafting meaningful animations that improve user intuition.

Experience.sectionSubtitle: My professional journey building scalable web applications

soff.title: Front-end Developer (Next.js)
soff.description: Worked on multiple production applications including Soff, Soff Seller, and Ilmiyish
achievements: Implemented efficient cache invalidation mechanism improving data consistency
Significantly improved frontend performance by optimizing rendering logic
Refactored legacy codebases increasing readability and maintainability

darmon.title: Front-end Developer (React/Next.js)
darmon.description: Worked on Darmon Servis internal CRM and Darmon Travel website
achievements: Contributed to large-scale ERP system for private clinic managing complex workflows
Implemented data virtualization for efficient large dataset rendering
Built custom complex table component with advanced mouse interactions

itkey.title: Software Engineer (React/Node.js)
itkey.description: Developed large-scale real estate CRM system used by major realtor companies
achievements: Successfully implemented system for NewHouse.uz, KNT.uz, and MegapolisBuxoro.uz
Built complex data-driven interfaces using React declarative UI package
Implemented scalable infinite data loading using async generators on Node.js backend
Developed highly interactive corporate websites with complex user interactions

dynbek.title: Front-end Developer (React)
dynbek.description: Participated in centralized barbershop management system with integrated CRM
achievements: Built responsive user interfaces without UI libraries, strengthening core fundamentals
Worked on CRM interface based on Enigma UI template
Gained hands-on experience in real-world workflows and team collaboration

ProjectsShowcase.sectionSubtitle: A selection of projects showcasing my expertise in modern web development, performance optimization, and scalable architecture

soff.description: High-performance Next.js e-commerce with 100 Lighthouse score
soff.longDescription: Built a scalable e-commerce platform using Next.js 14, React Server Components, and Edge Runtime. Implemented advanced caching strategies and optimized images resulting in perfect Lighthouse scores.

ilimiyish.longDescription: Developed a real-time analytics platform with WebSocket connections, Redis pub/sub, and optimized React rendering. Handles massive concurrent connections with sub-100ms latency.

realestatecrm.description: OpenAI-powered content creation tool with smart caching
realestatecrm.longDescription: Created an AI-powered content generation platform integrated with OpenAI API. Implemented intelligent caching, rate limiting, and streaming responses for optimal UX.

ishora.description: Jenkins + Docker orchestration with automated deployments
ishora.longDescription: Built a comprehensive CI/CD pipeline management system using Jenkins, Docker, and Kubernetes. Automated deployments reduced release time by 80%.

darmonservis.description: High-performance Next.js e-commerce with 100 Lighthouse score
darmonservis.longDescription: Built a scalable e-commerce platform using Next.js 14, React Server Components, and Edge Runtime. Implemented advanced caching strategies and optimized images resulting in perfect Lighthouse scores.

darmontravel.longDescription: Developed a real-time analytics platform with WebSocket connections, Redis pub/sub, and optimized React rendering. Handles massive concurrent connections with sub-100ms latency.

Footer.brandDescription: Creative Technologist crafting digital experiences that push boundaries. Specializing in modern web development and interactive design.
